name: Fudgie No- Bakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the cocoa powder, margarine, milk, sugar, and salt.
2. Bring the mixture to a full rolling boil over medium heat.
3. Remove from heat and stir in the remaining ingredients: peanut butter, rolled oats, and vanilla extract.
4. Drop spoonfuls of the batter onto waxed paper or parchment paper.
5. Allow the treats to cool completely before serving.
